name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
      - "feature/**"
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  workflow_dispatch:

concurrency:
  group: ci-${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  core-tests:
    name: Core tests (Python 3.12)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.12"
          cache: "pip"

      - name: Upgrade packaging tools
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel

      - name: Install test dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install pytest pytest-asyncio pytest-mock pytest-cov fakeredis anyio

      - name: Show Python environment
        run: |
          python --version
          python -m pip --version

      - name: Run core suite
        env:
          PYTHONPATH: hfa-core/src:hfa-tools/src:hfa-worker/src:hfa-control/src
        run: |
          python -m pytest tests/core -q --import-mode=importlib

  smoke-imports:
    name: Import smoke check
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.12"
          cache: "pip"

      - name: Upgrade packaging tools
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel

      - name: Smoke imports
        env:
          PYTHONPATH: hfa-core/src:hfa-tools/src:hfa-worker/src:hfa-control/src
        run: |
          python -c "import hfa.events.schema"
          python -c "import hfa_worker"
          python -c "import hfa_control"
          python -c "import hfa_tools"
